headline: TTM Technologies, Inc. (TTMI) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
summary: TTM (TTMI) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

raw.headline: TTM Technologies, Inc. (TTMI) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?

headline: A Look At TE Connectivity’s (TEL) Valuation As Earnings Expectations And AI Energy Demand Build
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) is drawing attention ahead of its second quarter fiscal 2026 earnings on April 22, with management projecting about 20% adjusted earnings growth and roughly 13% net sales growth year over year. See our latest analysis for TE Connectivity. That backdrop has coincided with a sharp shift in sentiment, with the share price delivering a 26.46% 1 month share price return and a 95.13% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum has been building ahead of the earnings...

headline: Vicor (VICR) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates
summary: Vicor (VICR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +10.00% and -0.99%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
